BBC NewsBBC News - News Front Page https://www.bbc.co.uk/news https://news.bbcimg.co.uk/nol/shared/img/bbc_news_120x60.gif英国广播公司新闻https://www.bbc.co.uk/news节点的 RSS 2026 年 3 月 12 日星期四 02:05:56 GMT Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.en-gb 15
'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with warIranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1mj1pyrzryo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1mj1pyrzryo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 16:00:34 GMT
Starmer was warned of 'reputational risk' over Mandelson's links with Epstein, files showDocuments also suggest the peer explored the possibility of a £500,000 severance payment after being sacked as US ambassador. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70lgywgqqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70lgywgqqo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 18:30:20 GMT
Chris Mason: Some nuggets but no huge revelations in first batch of Mandelson filesThis first digital document drop about the prime minister's decision to appoint Lord Mandelson as US ambassador is interesting, but not explosive. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c627x7g2l4vo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c627x7g2l4vo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 23:54:45 GMT
Hundreds of GPs tell BBC they have never refused a sick note over mental health concernsThe number of fit notes issued has been rising, with more than 11.2m approved in England last year. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20lew24kngo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20lew24kngo#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:01:53 GMT
Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBCModelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr4576v66kno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr4576v66kno#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:05:52 GMT
Inquiry into student loans launched by MPsThe Treasury Committee will look at whether "the goalposts [have] been moved in a way which is unfair". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxg70rr2geo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxg70rr2geo#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:03:21 GMT
Wind warnings issued as colder weather and mountain snow head southStrong winds are likely across many parts of the UK and conditions are turning colder towards the end of the week. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cz9q7y44ep4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cz9q7y44ep4o#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:41:04 GMT
Social media firms asked to toughen up age checks for under-13sInstagram, Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube and Roblox are among the platforms UK regulators say aren't putting children's safety at the heart of their products. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn48n18pg1eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn48n18pg1eo#0 Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:01:42 GMT
Prison inmate charged with Huntley murder appears in courtIan Huntley had been serving a life sentence with a minimum term of 40 years for the murders of 10-year-olds Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr5l9d1dv9eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr5l9d1dv9eo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 17:04:45 GMT
Boy, 15, arrested after girl is stabbed at schoolSources tell the BBC that pupils had to hide under their desks as the incident unfolded. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c15x1wnd7yqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c15x1wnd7yqo#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 19:04:38 GMT
Volcanic fragments rain down as Hawaii's Kilauea volcano eruptsThis eruption episode sent fragments made of ash, pumice, and pieces of volcanic glass into communities, forcing highway closures and the evacuation of tourists. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c2e4ljy1kp8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c2e4ljy1kp8o#0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 16:52:10 GMT
